name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES procState

(* TypeOK invariant: each process state is one of the three allowed values *)
TypeOK == /\ procState \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

(* Initial state: all processes are idle *)
Init == /\ procState = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

(* Transition for a process i *)
ProcStep(i) ==
  /\ procState[i] = "idle"
  /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]

TryStep(i) ==
  /\ procState[i] = "trying"
  /\ \A j \in 1..N : j # i => procState[j] # "critical"
  /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]

ExitStep(i) ==
  /\ procState[i] = "critical"
  /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

(* Next relation: any process may perform one of its steps *)
Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \/ ProcStep(i)
    \/ TryStep(i)
    \/ ExitStep(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<procState>>

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Participants
VARIABLES finishedParticipants, msgQueue, state, votes


\* Type constraints
TypeOK ==
    /\ state \in {"init", "prepare", "vote", "commit", "abort", "finished"}
    /\ votes \in [Participants -> {"yes", "no", "none"}]
    /\ msgQueue \in [Participants -> {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort", "None"}]
    /\ finishedParticipants \in SUBSET Participants

\* Initial state
Init ==
    /\ state = "init"
    /\ votes = [p \in Participants |-> "none"]
    /\ msgQueue = [p \in Participants |-> "None"]
    /\ finishedParticipants = {}

\* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants
SendPrepare ==
    /\ state = "init"
    /\ msgQueue' = [p \in Participants |-> "Prepare"]
    /\ state' = "prepare"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, finishedParticipants>>

\* Coordinator receives a Vote from a participant
ReceiveVote ==
    /\ state = "prepare"
    /\ \E p \in Participants :
        /\ msgQueue[p] = "VoteYes" \/ msgQueue[p] = "VoteNo"
        /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = IF msgQueue[p] = "VoteYes" THEN "yes" ELSE "no"]
        /\ msgQueue' = [msgQueue EXCEPT ![p] = "None"]
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, finishedParticipants>>

\* Coordinator decides to commit if all votes are yes
DecideCommit ==
    /\ state = "prepare"
    /\ \A p \in Participants : votes[p] = "yes"
    /\ msgQueue' = [p \in Participants |-> "Commit"]
    /\ state' = "commit"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, finishedParticipants>>

\* Coordinator decides to abort if any vote is no
DecideAbort ==
    /\ state = "prepare"
    /\ \E p \in Participants : votes[p] = "no"
    /\ msgQueue' = [p \in Participants |-> "Abort"]
    /\ state' = "abort"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, finishedParticipants>>

\* Participant processes Commit
ProcessCommit ==
    /\ state = "commit"
    /\ \E p \in Participants :
        /\ msgQueue[p] = "Commit"
        /\ msgQueue' = [msgQueue EXCEPT ![p] = "None"]
        /\ finishedParticipants' = finishedParticipants \cup {p}
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes>>

\* Participant processes Abort
ProcessAbort ==
    /\ state = "abort"
    /\ \E p \in Participants :
        /\ msgQueue[p] = "Abort"
        /\ msgQueue' = [msgQueue EXCEPT ![p] = "None"]
        /\ finishedParticipants' = finishedParticipants \cup {p}
        /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes>>

\* Coordinator finishes when all participants have finished
Finish ==
    /\ state = "commit" \/ state = "abort"
    /\ finishedParticipants = Participants
    /\ state' = "finished"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, msgQueue>>

\* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock
Terminate ==
    /\ state = "finished"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, msgQueue, finishedParticipants>>

Next ==
    \/ SendPrepare
    \/ ReceiveVote
    \/ DecideCommit
    \/ DecideAbort
    \/ ProcessCommit
    \/ ProcessAbort
    \/ Finish
    \/ Terminate

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, votes, msgQueue, finishedParticipants>> /\ TypeOK

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j (1..N),
   forks[i] = 0 means fork i is free *)
(* state[i] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)

vars == <<forks, state>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ forks \in 0..N \X 0..N
    /\ state \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} \X 0..N

Init ==
    /\ forks = <<0 \X 0 \X ... \X 0>>  (* all forks free *)
    /\ state = <<"thinking" \X "thinking" \X ... \X "thinking">>

Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

Hungry(i) ==
    /\ state[i] = "hungry"
    /\ forks[i] = 0
    /\ forks[Right(i)] = 0

TakeForks(i) ==
    /\ forks[i] = 0
    /\ forks[Right(i)] = 0
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![Right(i)] = i]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

PutForks(i) ==
    /\ state[i] = "eating"
    /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![Right(i)] = 0]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 1..N:
        /\ state[i] = "thinking"
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        /\ forks' = forks
    \/ \E i \in 1..N:
        /\ Hungry(i)
        /\ TakeForks(i)
    \/ \E i \in 1..N:
        /\ PutForks(i)
    \/ Terminating

Terminating ==
    /\ UNCHANGED vars

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES num, flag

(* num[i] is the ticket number of process i (0..N-1)
   flag[i] is TRUE if process i is choosing a ticket *)
TypeOK == /\ num \in [0..N-1 -> 0..N]
          /\ flag \in [0..N-1 -> BOOLEAN]

Init == /\ num = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> FALSE]

(* Helper: maximum ticket number among all processes *)
maxNum == CHOOSE m \in 0..N : \A i \in 0..N-1 : num[i] <= m

Next ==
  \E i \in 0..N-1 :
    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<num>>
  \/ \E i \in 0..N-1 :
    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
    /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = maxNum + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<flag>>
  \/ \E i \in 0..N-1 :
    /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<num>>
  \/ Terminating
Terminating == /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, each element in 0..K *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(0..K)
    /\ head \in 0..K
    /\ tail \in 0..K
    /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state: empty queue *)
Init == 
    /\ q = <<0, .., 0>>  (* K zeros *)
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: enqueue an item if not full *)
Producer == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ LET newTail == (tail + 1) % K IN
       /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![newTail] = 1]  (* enqueue value 1 for illustration *)
       /\ head' = head
       /\ tail' = newTail
       /\ size' = size + 1
       /\ UNCHANGED <<>>  (* all other vars unchanged *)

(* Consumer action: dequeue an item if not empty *)
Consumer == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ LET newHead == (head + 1) % K IN
       /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![newHead] = 0]  (* dequeue, set to 0 *)
       /\ head' = newHead
       /\ tail' = tail
       /\ size' = size - 1
       /\ UNCHANGED <<>>  (* all other vars unchanged *)

(* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock *)
Terminating == UNCHANGED <<q, head, tail, size>>

Next == Producer \/ Consumer \/ Terminating

vars == <<q, head, tail, size>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Majority
VARIABLES currentTerm, serverId, state, votedFor


(* Types *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ currentTerm \in 0..N
    /\ votedFor \in 0..N \/ {None}
    /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}
    /\ serverId \in 1..N

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ currentTerm = 0
    /\ votedFor = None
    /\ state = "Follower"
    /\ serverId \in 1..N

(* Candidate requests votes from all servers *)
RequestVote ==
    /\ state = "Follower"
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
    /\ votedFor' = serverId
    /\ state' = "Candidate"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<serverId>>

(* Vote granted by a server *)
VoteGranted ==
    /\ state = "Candidate"
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
    /\ votedFor' = votedFor
    /\ state' = "Leader"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<serverId>>

(* Vote denied by a server *)
VoteDenied ==
    /\ state = "Candidate"
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
    /\ votedFor' = votedFor
    /\ state' = "Follower"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<serverId>>

(* Term update from another server *)
UpdateTerm ==
    /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate"}
    /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
    /\ votedFor' = None
    /\ state' = "Follower"
    /\ UNCHANGED <<serverId>>

(* Terminate if no action possible *)
Terminating ==
    /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state, serverId>>

Next ==
    \/ RequestVote
    \/ VoteGranted
    \/ VoteDenied
    \/ UpdateTerm
    \/ Terminating

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state, serverId>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE readers, writer_active

vars == <<readers, writer_active>>

Init ==
    /\ readers = 0
    /\ writer_active = FALSE

TypeOK ==
    /\ readers \in 0..N
    /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

ReadRequest ==
    /\ writer_active = FALSE
    /\ readers' = readers + 1
    /\ writer_active' = writer_active

ReadRelease ==
    /\ readers > 0
    /\ readers' = readers - 1
    /\ writer_active' = writer_active

WriteRequest ==
    /\ readers = 0
    /\ writer_active = FALSE
    /\ writer_active' = TRUE
    /\ readers' = readers

WriteRelease ==
    /\ writer_active = TRUE
    /\ writer_active' = FALSE
    /\ readers' = readers

Next ==
    \/ ReadRequest
    \/ ReadRelease
    \/ WriteRequest
    \/ WriteRelease
    \/ Terminating

Terminating ==
    /\ UNCHANGED vars

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Channels
VARIABLES channelState, finished, localState, markerReceived, markerSent, state

    /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "recording", "finished"}]
    /\ localState \in [1..N -> 0..1000]
    /\ channelState \in [Channels -> 0..1000]
    /\ markerSent \in [Channels -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ markerReceived \in [Channels -> BOOLEAN]
    /\ finished \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]

Init ==
    /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
    /\ localState = [p \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ channelState = [c \in Channels |-> 0]
    /\ markerSent = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]
    /\ markerReceived = [c \in Channels |-> FALSE]
    /\ finished = [p \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

SendMarker(p, q) ==
    /\ state[p] = "recording"
    /\ markerSent[(p,q)] = FALSE
    /\ markerSent'[(p,q)] = TRUE
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, markerReceived, finished>>

ReceiveMarker(p, q) ==
    /\ state[p] = "idle"
    /\ markerReceived[(p,q)] = FALSE
    /\ markerReceived'[(p,q)] = TRUE
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "recording"]
    /\ localState' = [localState EXCEPT ![p] = localState[p] + 1] \* record local state
    /\ UNCHANGED <<channelState, markerSent, finished>>

ReceiveMarkerAfterRecording(p, q) ==
    /\ state[p] = "recording"
    /\ markerReceived[(p,q)] = FALSE
    /\ markerReceived'[(p,q)] = TRUE
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, channelState, markerSent, finished>>

FinishProcess(p) ==
    /\ state[p] = "recording"
    /\ \A q \in 1..N : q \in 1..N /\ (p,q) \in Channels => markerReceived[(p,q)]
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "finished"]
    /\ finished' = [finished EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<localState, channelState, markerSent, markerReceived>>

SendData(p, q, d) ==
    /\ state[p] \in {"idle", "recording"}
    /\ channelState[(p,q)] = 0
    /\ channelState'[(p,q)] = d
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, markerSent, markerReceived, finished>>

ReceiveData(p, q, d) ==
    /\ state[p] = "recording"
    /\ markerReceived[(p,q)] = FALSE
    /\ channelState[(p,q)] = d
    /\ channelState'[(p,q)] = 0
    /\ UNCHANGED <<state, localState, markerSent, markerReceived, finished>>

Next ==
    \/ \E p, q \in 1..N : (p,q) \in Channels /\ SendMarker(p, q)
    \/ \E p, q \in 1..N : (p,q) \in Channels /\ ReceiveMarker(p, q)
    \/ \E p, q \in 1..N : (p,q) \in Channels /\ ReceiveMarkerAfterRecording(p, q)
    \/ \E p \in 1..N : FinishProcess(p)
    \/ \E p, q \in 1..N : (p,q) \in Channels /\ SendData(p, q, 1)
    \/ \E p, q \in 1..N : (p,q) \in Channels /\ ReceiveData(p, q, 1)
    \/ Terminating

Terminating ==
    /\ \A p \in 1..N : finished[p]
    /\ UNCHANGED vars

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

VARIABLE token

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLES nextId, pending, store


(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
    /\ pending \in [Nat -> [op |-> {"Put", "Get"},
                               key |-> Keys,
                               val |-> Values \cup {""},
                               id  |-> Nat,
                               status |-> {"pending", "completed"}]]
    /\ nextId \in Nat

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> ""]
    /\ pending = [i \in 1..0 |-> [op |-> "", key |-> "", val |-> "", id |-> 0, status |-> ""]]
    /\ nextId = 1

(* Helper: get the most recent Put for a key *)
LatestPut(k) ==
    LET puts == {i \in DOMAIN pending |
                 pending[i].op = "Put" /\ pending[i].key = k /\ pending[i].status = "completed"} IN
    IF \E i \in puts: pending[i].id = MAX puts
    THEN pending[ MAX puts ].val


(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \/ \* Put operation
       LET opId == nextId IN
       /\ pending' = [pending EXCEPT ![opId] = [op |-> "Put",
                                                   key |-> k,
                                                   val |-> v,
                                                   id  |-> opId,
                                                   status |-> "completed"]]
       /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
       /\ nextId' = opId + 1
       /\ UNCHANGED <<pending, store, nextId>>
    \/ \* Get operation
       LET opId == nextId IN
       /\ pending' = [pending EXCEPT ![opId] = [op |-> "Get",
                                                   key |-> k,
                                                   val |-> LatestPut(k),
                                                   id  |-> opId,
                                                   status |-> "completed"]]
       /\ nextId' = opId + 1
       /\ UNCHANGED <<pending, store, nextId>>
    \/ \* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock
       /\ UNCHANGED <<store, pending, nextId>>

(* Specification *)
vars == <<store, pending, nextId>>
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES channelState, currentChunk, fileSize, finished, retransmitCount, sentChunks


(* Helper definitions *)
ChunkCount == \* Number of chunks in the file
    fileSize

ChunkNumber == \* Current chunk number (1..ChunkCount)
    currentChunk

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq(1..ChunkCount)
    /\ retransmitCount \in 0..MAX_RETRIES
    /\ currentChunk \in 1..ChunkCount
    /\ fileSize \in 1..FILE_SIZE
    /\ channelState \in {"sent", "lost"}
    /\ finished \in BOOLEAN

(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ currentChunk = 1
    /\ fileSize = ChunkCount
    /\ channelState = "sent"
    /\ finished = FALSE

(* Sending a chunk: non-deterministically decide if it is lost *)
SendChunk ==
    /\ channelState' = CHOOSE state \in {"sent", "lost"} : state
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, retransmitCount, currentChunk, fileSize, finished>>

(* Successful receipt: chunk is appended to sentChunks and move to next chunk *)
AckSuccess ==
    /\ channelState = "sent"
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, currentChunk)
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    /\ currentChunk' = IF currentChunk = ChunkCount THEN ChunkCount ELSE currentChunk + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<fileSize, finished>>

(* Retransmission attempt after loss *)
Retransmit ==
    /\ channelState = "lost"
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, currentChunk, fileSize, finished, channelState>>

(* Give up after exceeding MAX_RETRIES *)
GiveUp ==
    /\ channelState = "lost"
    /\ retransmitCount = MAX_RETRIES
    /\ finished' = TRUE
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, currentChunk, fileSize, channelState>>

(* Termination: all chunks sent *)
Terminate ==
    /\ currentChunk = ChunkCount
    /\ finished' = TRUE
    /\ UNCHANGED <<sentChunks, retransmitCount, fileSize, channelState>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ AckSuccess
    \/ Retransmit
    \/ GiveUp
    \/ Terminate

vars == <<sentChunks, retransmitCount, currentChunk, fileSize, channelState, finished>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS TxnIds, DataItems, Values
VARIABLES activeTxns, data, snapshot, state, t, writeSet


(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Type constraints *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ data \in [DataItems -> Values]
    /\ snapshot \in [TxnIds -> [DataItems -> Values]]
    /\ writeSet \in [TxnIds -> [DataItems -> Values]]
    /\ state \in [TxnIds -> {"idle", "begin", "active", "commit", "abort"}]
    /\ activeTxns \in SUBSET TxnIds

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ data = [d \in DataItems |-> VALUES[0]]          \* All data items start with value 0
    /\ snapshot = [t \in TxnIds |-> [d \in DataItems |-> VALUES[0]]]
    /\ writeSet = [t \in TxnIds |-> [d \in DataItems |-> VALUES[0]]]
    /\ state = [t \in TxnIds |-> "idle"]
    /\ activeTxns = {}

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Transaction actions *)

BeginTxn(t) ==
    /\ state[t] = "idle"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![t] = "begin"]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<data, snapshot, writeSet, activeTxns>>

BeginTxnStep(t) ==
    /\ state[t] = "begin"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![t] = "active"]
    /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![t] = data]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<data, writeSet, activeTxns>>

Read(t, d) ==
    /\ state[t] = "active"
    /\ d \in DataItems
    /\ UNCHANGED <<data, snapshot, writeSet, state, activeTxns>>
    \* The read value is snapshot[t][d] (not modeled explicitly)

Write(t, d, v) ==
    /\ state[t] = "active"
    /\ d \in DataItems
    /\ v \in Values
    /\ writeSet' = [writeSet EXCEPT ![t][d] = v]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<data, snapshot, state, activeTxns>>

Commit(t) ==
    /\ state[t] = "active"
    /\ \A d \in DataItems :
          \A t' \in activeTxns \setminus {t} :
              writeSet[t'][d] # writeSet[t][d]  \* No write-write conflict
    /\ data' = [data EXCEPT ![d] = writeSet[t][d] \* Apply writes of t
                 \* Note: if writeSet[t][d] = VALUES[0], this is a no-op
                 \* For all d, we apply the write from t
                 \* Since writeSet[t] contains a value for every d, we can use this
                 \* mapping directly
                 \* This ensures atomic commit
                 \* The mapping is defined for all d
                 \* The update is performed for all d
                 \* The update is performed atomically
                 \* The update is performed in a single step

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS N, MAX_DRIFT, EPSILON
VARIABLES clocks, node, round


(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Type constraints for all variables *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ clocks \in [1..N -> 0..MAX_DRIFT*N]
    /\ round \in 0..N

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Initialisation: clocks start at 0, round 0 *)
Init ==
    /\ clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ round = 0

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Drift: each node's clock may change by an integer offset in -MAX_DRIFT..MAX_DRIFT *)
Drift ==
    /\ \E delta \in [1..N -> -MAX_DRIFT..MAX_DRIFT] :
        clocks' = [i \in 1..N |-> clocks[i] + delta[i]]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Synchronisation: each node sets its clock to the average of all clocks *)
Sync ==
    /\ let avg = Floor[ (SUM_{i \in 1..N} clocks[i]) \div N ] in
       clocks' = [i \in 1..N |-> avg]
    /\ UNCHANGED round

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* One round consists of a drift followed by a synchronisation *)
OneRound ==
    /\ Drift
    /\ Sync
    /\ round' = round + 1

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Next-state relation: either perform a round or terminate *)
Next ==
    \/ OneRound
    \/ /\ round = N
       /\ UNCHANGED <<clocks, round>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Specification *)
Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, round>> /\ TypeOK

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Invariant: after N rounds, all clocks are within EPSILON of each other *)
SyncInvariant ==
    /\ round = N
    /\ \A i, j \in 1..N : Abs[clocks[i] - clocks[j]] <= EPSILON

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Proof obligation: the invariant holds at the end of the spec *)
THEOREM SyncInvariant => Spec

====

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson2 ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

CONSTANTS N
ASSUME N = 2

VARIABLES flag, turn

(* flag is a sequence of booleans of length N *)
(* turn is an integer in 0..N-1 *)

vars == <<flag, turn>>

Init ==
    /\ flag = <<FALSE, FALSE>>
    /\ turn = 0

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ flag \in <<FALSE, FALSE>, <<FALSE, TRUE>, <<TRUE, FALSE>, <<TRUE, TRUE>>>
    /\ turn \in 0..N-1

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \/ (* Process 0 enters critical section *)
       /\ flag[0] = FALSE
       /\ flag[1] = FALSE
       /\ flag' = <<TRUE, flag[1]>>
       /\ turn' = 1
       /\ UNCHANGED <<turn>>
    \/ (* Process 1 enters critical section *)
       /\ flag[0] = FALSE
       /\ flag[1] = FALSE
       /\ flag' = <<flag[0], TRUE>>
       /\ turn' = 0
       /\ UNCHANGED <<turn>>
    \/ (* Process 0 exits critical section *)
       /\ flag[0] = TRUE
       /\ flag[1] = TRUE
       /\ flag' = <<FALSE, flag[1]>>
       /\ UNCHANGED <<turn>>
    \/ (* Process 1 exits critical section *)
       /\ flag[0] = TRUE
       /\ flag[1] = TRUE
       /\ flag' = <<flag[0], FALSE>>
       /\ UNCHANGED <<turn>>
    \/ (* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock *)
       /\ UNCHANGED vars

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Update
VARIABLES infected, round

    /\ infected \subseteq 1..N
    /\ round \in 0..N

Init ==
    /\ infected = {}
    /\ round = 0

SendUpdate(node) ==
    /\ node \in 1..N
    /\ node \in infected
    /\ \E target \in 1..N : target \notin infected

Next ==
    \/ /\ round' = round + 1
       /\ UNCHANGED <<infected>>
    \/ /\ round' = round + 1
       /\ \E node \in 1..N :
            /\ node \in infected
            /\ \E target \in 1..N :
                /\ target \notin infected
                /\ infected' = infected \cup {target}
    \/ /\ round' = round
       /\ UNCHANGED <<infected>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<infected, round>>

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PageAllocator ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Clients, N, Clients, Pages
VARIABLES allocated, free

    /\ free \subseteq Pages
    /\ allocated \in [Clients -> SUBSET Pages]
    /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq Pages
    /\ \A c \in Clients: allocated[c] \subseteq free \cup (Pages \ free)

Init ==
    /\ free = Pages
    /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Request(c, p) ==
    /\ c \in Clients
    /\ p \in Pages
    /\ p \in free
    /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
    /\ free' = free \ {p}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Release(c, p) ==
    /\ c \in Clients
    /\ p \in Pages
    /\ p \in allocated[c]
    /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \ {p}]
    /\ free' = free \cup {p}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

Next ==
    \E c \in Clients : \E p \in Pages :
        Request(c, p)
    \/ \E c \in Clients : \E p \in Pages :
        Release(c, p)
    \/ Terminating

Terminating ==
    /\ UNCHANGED <<free, allocated>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS Topics, Subscribers, Publishers, MaxMsgId, MaxMsgPerTopic
VARIABLES delivered, msgMap, msgSeq, nextMsgId, reg


(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Type constraints *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ reg \in [Topics -> SUBSET Subscribers]
    /\ msgSeq \in [Topics -> Seq(0..MaxMsgPerTopic)]
    /\ msgMap \in [Topics -> [0..MaxMsgPerTopic -> [0..MaxMsgId -> [0..MaxMsgId]]]]
    /\ nextMsgId \in [Topics -> 0..MaxMsgPerTopic]
    /\ delivered \in [Topics -> [Subscribers -> [0..MaxMsgPerTopic -> BOOLEAN]]]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Initial state *)
Init ==
    /\ reg = [t \in Topics |-> {}]
    /\ msgSeq = [t \in Topics |-> <<>>]
    /\ msgMap = [t \in Topics |-> [i \in 0..MaxMsgPerTopic |-> [m \in 0..MaxMsgId |-> 0]]]
    /\ nextMsgId = [t \in Topics |-> 0]
    /\ delivered = [t \in Topics |-> [s \in Subscribers |-> [i \in 0..MaxMsgPerTopic |-> FALSE]]]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Actions *)

(* Subscriber registers to a topic *)
Register(sub, topic) ==
    /\ sub \in Subscribers
    /\ topic \in Topics
    /\ sub \notin reg[topic]
    /\ reg' = [reg EXCEPT ![topic] = @ \union {sub}]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<msgSeq, msgMap, nextMsgId, delivered>>

(* Publisher posts a message to a topic *)
Post(pub, topic, content) ==
    /\ pub \in Publishers
    /\ topic \in Topics
    /\ nextMsgId[topic] < MaxMsgPerTopic
    /\ msgId = nextMsgId[topic]
    /\ msgSeq' = [msgSeq EXCEPT ![topic] = Append(@, msgId)]
    /\ msgMap' = [msgMap EXCEPT ![topic][msgId][content] = content]
    /\ nextMsgId' = [nextMsgId EXCEPT ![topic] = @ + 1]
    /\ delivered' = [delivered EXCEPT ![topic][s][msgId] = FALSE
                      \* for all subscribers s]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<reg>>

(* Deliver a message to a subscriber *)
Deliver(topic, sub, msgId) ==
    /\ topic \in Topics
    /\ sub \in Subscribers
    /\ msgId \in msgSeq[topic]
    /\ sub \in reg[topic]
    /\ delivered[topic][sub][msgId] = FALSE
    /\ delivered' = [delivered EXCEPT ![topic][sub][msgId] = TRUE]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<reg, msgSeq, msgMap, nextMsgId>>

(* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock *)
Terminate ==
    /\ UNCHANGED <<reg, msgSeq, msgMap, nextMsgId, delivered>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \/ \E sub \in Subscribers : \E topic \in Topics :
           Register(sub, topic)
    \/ \E pub \in Publishers : \E topic \in Topics : \E content \in 0..MaxMsgId :
           Post(pub, topic, content)
    \/ \E topic \in Topics : \E sub \in Subscribers : \E msgId \in 0..MaxMsgPerTopic :
           Deliver(topic, sub, msgId)
    \/ Terminate

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Specification *)
vars == <<reg, msgSeq, msgMap, nextMsgId, delivered>>
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Naturals, TLC

CONSTANTS N
VARIABLES turn, wants


(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ turn \in 0..1
          /\ wants \in [0..1 -> BOOLEAN]

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = [i \in 0..1 |-> FALSE]

(* Safety invariant: at most one process in critical section *)
Safety == \A i, j \in 0..1 : (i # j) => ~(wants[i] /\ wants[j])

(* Liveness invariant: if a process wants to enter, it will eventually enter *)
Liveness == \A i \in 0..1 : (wants[i] => <> (wants[i]))

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
    \/ (* Process 0 attempts to enter critical section *)
       /\ wants[0] = FALSE
       /\ wants[1] = FALSE
       /\ turn = 0
       /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = TRUE]
       /\ UNCHANGED turn
    \/ (* Process 1 attempts to enter critical section *)
       /\ wants[0] = FALSE
       /\ wants[1] = FALSE
       /\ turn = 1
       /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = TRUE]
       /\ UNCHANGED turn
    \/ (* Process 0 exits critical section *)
       /\ wants[0] = TRUE
       /\ wants[1] = FALSE
       /\ turn = 0
       /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![0] = FALSE]
       /\ UNCHANGED turn
    \/ (* Process 1 exits critical section *)
       /\ wants[0] = FALSE
       /\ wants[1] = TRUE
       /\ turn = 1
       /\ wants' = [wants EXCEPT ![1] = FALSE]
       /\ UNCHANGED turn
    \/ (* Process 0 yields turn to 1 *)
       /\ wants[0] = TRUE
       /\ wants[1] = FALSE
       /\ turn = 0
       /\ turn' = 1
       /\ UNCHANGED wants
    \/ (* Process 1 yields turn to 0 *)
       /\ wants[0] = FALSE
       /\ wants[1] = TRUE
       /\ turn = 1
       /\ turn' = 0
       /\ UNCHANGED wants
    \/ (* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock *)
       /\ UNCHANGED <<turn, wants>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
vars == <<turn, wants>>

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES counts

(* Type invariant: counts is a matrix of size N x N with entries in 0..N *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ counts \in [1..N -> [1..N -> 0..N]]
    /\ \A i \in 1..N: \A j \in 1..N: counts[i][j] \in 0..N

(* Initial state: all counts are zero *)
Init == 
    /\ counts = [i \in 1..N |-> [j \in 1..N |-> 0]]

(* Increment operation: node i increments its own slot *)
Inc(i) == 
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![i][i] = counts[i][i] + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Merge operation: node i merges its counts with node j *)
Merge(i, j) == 
    /\ i \in 1..N
    /\ j \in 1..N
    /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![i][k] = Max(counts[i][k], counts[j][k]) : k \in 1..N]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Termination disjunct to avoid deadlock *)
Terminating == UNCHANGED <<counts>>

(* Next-state relation: any node can increment or merge with any other node *)
Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N: Inc(i)
    \/ \E i, j \in 1..N: Merge(i, j)
    \/ Terminating

(* Global count: sum of maximum counts for each node *)
GlobalCount == 
    \E n \in 1..N: 
        LET maxCount(n) == \E i \in 1..N: counts[i][n] 
        IN \Sum_{n \in 1..N} maxCount(n)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<counts>>
